displayDescription.zh: Conditional GAN 把类别标签或其他辅助信息同时加入生成器和判别器。这让对抗生成从无方向的数据分布采样变成可控制生成。
displayDescription.en: Conditional GAN added labels or other side information to both the generator and discriminator. This made adversarial generation controllable rather than only sampling from an undirected data distribution.

description.en: arXiv source card for Conditional GAN.

license.en: Reference link only; local explainers are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地解释图为原创重绘。

html.zh: Conditional GAN 把类别标签或其他辅助信息同时加入生成器和判别器。这让对抗生成从无方向的数据分布采样变成可控制生成。
html.en: Conditional GAN added labels or other side information to both the generator and discriminator. This made adversarial generation controllable rather than only sampling from an undirected data distribution.

html.zh: 条件向量与噪声配对，使生成器能够合成符合指定类别或属性的样本。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。
html.en: A condition vector is paired with noise so the generator can synthesize samples that match a requested class or attribute. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Conditional GAN 视为生成模型控制机制的基础。它的长期影响在于条件化模式被图像转换、文生图和可控合成系统反复使用。
html.en: Experts generally treat conditional GANs as a foundational control mechanism for generative models. Its long-term legacy is the conditioning pattern reused by image translation, text-to-image, and controllable synthesis systems.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
